return(function(V,H,p,z,x,Z,t,A,U,a,X,R,J,k,M,I,s,q,O,n,y,T)U,R,O,y,a,A,T,J,I,X,q,k,s,n,M=478469-478469,function(V,i)local H=k(i)local p=function(p,z,x)return O(V,{p;z;x},i,H)end return p
